approval_decision_manifest.guardrail: Only ready_to_approve decisions may be applied through --checked-batch; held rows require repair first.

pre_apply_checklist: Review copy, links, and media for every ready row.
Run the preview command and confirm it lists only ready_ids.
Confirm held_ids are excluded from the checked batch.
Apply only with --checked-batch after human review passes.
post_apply_evidence: data/scheduled_posts.csv shows ready_ids changed from approved=no to approved=yes.
data/scheduled_approval_packet.json reports fewer approval blockers after refresh.
data/social_scheduler_dry_run.json no longer blocks the approved row on not_approved.
guardrails: This manifest does not approve, publish, post, or log anything.
Do not use the full batch command while held_ids are present.
Do not approve held rows until failed review checks clear.

steps.title: Review ready checked-batch rows
steps.evidence: Review copy_block, destination_links, asset_url, and checklist for each ready row.

steps.title: Preview the guarded checked batch
steps.evidence: Dry run must report no file writes and only the checked IDs.

steps.title: Apply after human review
steps.evidence: Apply only after human copy/media/link review passes.

steps.title: Refresh and validate admin state
steps.evidence: Admin should show fewer approval blockers and fresh execution state.
